updates.title: Custom Plan Builder!
updates.description: Create your own personalized workout plans! Pick your challenges, set your schedule, and let the mascot help you build your routine.

updates.title: New Mascot Animations
updates.description: The mascot is now more interactive! Watch it help you create your plans with fun new animations and speech bubbles.

updates.title: Root Path Storage
updates.description: Your custom plans are now stored securely at the root level, making them more robust and easier to manage.

updates.title: Smoother Experience
updates.description: Faster data syncing and smoother transitions between app screens for a more responsive feel.
